economic_mechanism: When implied-vol rank is elevated and the trend stack is non-broken (bullish or neutral regime), short put credit spreads monetize a volatility-risk-premium / non-collapse forecast with defined max loss. Stand aside pure bear and low-IV bars. 50% profit targets harvest mean-reversion swings without holding into late gamma.
regime_envelope: bullish|neutral + iv_rank>=30 → PCS; bearish|low IV → stand_aside
stand_aside_rule: Stand aside when regime is bearish/unknown, iv_rank below 30, credit/max-loss filters fail, or the one-lot sleeve slot is occupied.
greek_intended: short put vertical; positive theta; limited negative vega; mild long delta
greek_dangerous: gap down through short put; IV crush after entry reduces credit opportunity but defined loss remains; prolonged bear after entry
notes: Stronger forecast seed: IV-rich non-collapse PCS (not DTE polish of closed router families). Proxy L0 only. Control is unconditional same management without IV/regime stand-aside advantage.
